message:
feat(tls): add session resumption API to TlsConnectorBuilder (bd-3qur)

Expose session resumption configuration via:
- session_resumption(Resumption) for custom storage (e.g., 512 sessions)
- disable_session_resumption() to force full handshake on every connection

Rustls defaults to in-memory session storage (256 sessions), so resumption
works out of the box. These methods allow explicit control for security
policies or testing scenarios. Includes unit tests for both paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
